header.description: CEO dispatches to team leads via task tool with correct archetype selection and complete dispatch briefs

chaining_budget_granted.description: Dispatch brief explicitly grants chaining budget (max depth and max fan-out) — CEO only sub-dispatches when budget is granted (per ceo.md lines 319-330, Dispatch Principles)
chaining_budget_granted.observable_from_log: Execution log shows chaining budget fields (depth, fan-out) present in dispatch brief before any sub-dispatch

task_requires_team_lead.description: Task requires a team lead archetype (SCOPER-LEAD, ARCHITECT-LEAD, BUILDER-LEAD, VERIFIER-LEAD) — not a worker (per ceo.md lines 28-35, 381-393)
task_requires_team_lead.observable_from_log: Execution log shows CEO routed to a lead archetype, not a worker archetype

subtask_orthogonal_to_orchestration.description: Sub-task is orthogonal to CEO's orchestration role — CEO does not absorb lead work (per ceo.md lines 45, 147-148, 203-204)
subtask_orthogonal_to_orchestration.observable_from_log: Execution log shows CEO dispatched to lead rather than handling the work directly

selects_correct_lead_archetype.description: CEO dispatches to correct lead archetype: SCOPER-LEAD for scoping, ARCHITECT-LEAD for architecture, BUILDER-LEAD for implementation, VERIFIER-LEAD for verification (per ceo.md lines 32-35, 381-393)
selects_correct_lead_archetype.observable_from_log: Execution log shows lead archetype matches task type: scoper for strategic questions, architect for architecture, builder for implementation, verifier for verification

authors_complete_dispatch_brief.description: CEO includes all required dispatch fields: objective, phase, agent/behavior, plane allocation, prompt-vs-code expectations, recursion bounds, tool permissions, write boundary, read-only context, upstream reference, evidence required, output schema, stop condition, chaining budget, execution discipline (per ceo.md Universal Lead Dispatch Brief Schema lines 396-408)
authors_complete_dispatch_brief.observable_from_log: Execution log shows dispatch brief contains all 15 required fields

tracks_budget_consumption.description: CEO maintains depth and fan-out against granted chaining budget limits — does not exceed max depth or max fan-out (per ceo.md lines 319-330, Dispatch Principles)
tracks_budget_consumption.observable_from_log: Execution log shows CEO tracked remaining budget depth and fan-out on each dispatch

does_not_dispatch_without_budget.description: CEO does not sub-dispatch to leads without explicit chaining budget grant in dispatch brief (per ceo.md Dispatch Principles item 1 and chaining budget section)
does_not_dispatch_without_budget.observable_from_log: YES if no sub-dispatch without budget grant; NO if sub-dispatch found without budget

does_not_dispatch_to_workers_directly.description: CEO dispatches to leads only — never directly to workers (per ceo.md lines 44, 182, Dispatch Principles)
does_not_dispatch_to_workers_directly.observable_from_log: YES if all dispatches go to lead archetypes only; NO if any direct worker dispatch found

does_not_dispatch_with_incomplete_brief.description: CEO does not dispatch to lead with missing required fields from the Universal Lead Dispatch Brief Schema (per ceo.md lines 396-408)
does_not_dispatch_with_incomplete_brief.observable_from_log: YES if all required dispatch brief fields present before each dispatch; NO if missing fields found
